title: K@ruwb #3743
definition:
Cherub = "blessing"

 1) an apparent exilic settlement in Babylonia from which some persons
    of doubtful extraction returned with Zerubbabel
nasbUsage:
Definition: Cherub = "blessing"

 1) an apparent exilic settlement in Babylonia from which some persons
    of doubtful extraction returned with Zerubbabel

    NASB:  a place in Bab.
